name: C-10 --section freshness-badge bundles the per-commit sha in the emit per the architecture per-commit contract
command: printf '%s' '{"standards":"fresh","pr_corpus":"fresh","compliance":"fresh"}' > f.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --section freshness-badge --emit p.json --freshness-file f.json --commit-sha cafef00d --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && grep -q 'cafef00d' p.json && echo recorded 1>&2
